tasks.title: scripts/ingest_parsed_pdfs.py — upsert all parsed_pdf.pkl into MongoDB parsed_pdfs collection
acceptance_criteria: Script at scripts/ingest_parsed_pdfs.py; callable as: python scripts/ingest_parsed_pdfs.py [--dry-run] [--limit N]
Uses get_pdfs_from_cache() from ema_scraper to iterate (cache_path, url) pairs
Upserts into ema_scraper.parsed_pdfs with _id=url; fields: markdown, parsed_with, error, cache_path (str), ingested_at (ISO timestamp)
Batch size 500 bulk_write; tqdm progress bar; prints final stats (total/ingested/errors/skipped)
--dry-run: prints count of pkl files found, zero DB writes
ruff + mypy clean

tasks.title: Run ingestion script and validate parsed_pdfs collection
acceptance_criteria: Script runs to completion without fatal errors
parsed_pdfs.countDocuments() is between 60000 and 70000
Sample of 5 documents shows non-empty markdown and error=="" for successful parses
Error rate (error != "") is documented in exploration.md
Collection size on disk is noted (mongosh db.stats())

tasks.title: corpus/sources/mongo_source.py — MongoDB adaptor yielding QARecord (TASK-007)
acceptance_criteria: corpus/sources/__init__.py created
corpus/sources/mongo_source.py: records_from_mongodb(host, db, html_query=None, pdf_query=None) -> Iterator[QARecord]
HTML branch: streams web_items where content_type matches html, fetches response_body, calls html_extractor.extract_from_html()
PDF branch: streams parsed_pdfs where error=="", calls pdf_extractor.extract_from_markdown(doc['markdown'], doc['_id'])
Each branch logs per-doc extraction failures and continues (non-fatal)
ruff + mypy clean; no business logic — just adaptor glue

tasks.title: Integration test + full corpus run producing corpus/corpus.jsonl
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_mongo_source.py: integration test (marked pytest.mark.integration) verifies >= 10 QARecords from live MongoDB
build_corpus.build_corpus(records_from_mongodb(...), corpus/corpus.jsonl) runs without error
corpus/corpus.jsonl exists with >= 200 records (or SCOPE-RISK printed if fewer)
HISTORY.md updated with this work unit's row
